rationale.hitl-workflow: Documents developers using checkpoints and bounded delegation to control agents.
rationale.rules-based-checks: Documents practitioners using tests and linters to validate agentic output.
rationale.ai-review: Documents practitioners using agents to review pull requests and code.
rationale.oversight-explanation: Documents practitioners monitoring agent thinking processes for visibility into actions.
rationale.counterpoint: Argues against the prevailing automation-maximalist vibe coding approach.
rationale.risk-quality: Clause fired: reports empirical results about maintaining code quality attributes.
rationale.risk-overreliance: Clause fired: reports empirical results about mitigating over-reliance on agents.
